action.proof_term:
intro ι s g μ y hg hμ hsum
have hcs := Finset.sq_sum_div_le_sum_sq_div s (fun i => μ i * y i) hg
rw [hsum] at hcs
simp only [one_pow] at hcs
have heq : ∀ i ∈ s, (μ i * y i)^2 / g i = y i ^2 / g i := by
  intro i hi
  have h1 : (μ i)^2 = 1 := hμ i hi
  have h2 : (μ i * y i)^2 = (μ i)^2 * y i ^2 := by ring
  rw [h2, h1, one_mul]
rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl heq] at hcs
linarith [hcs]

intro ι s g μ y hg hμ hsum
have hcs := Finset.sq_sum_div_le_sum_sq_div s (fun i => μ i * y i) hg
rw [hsum] at hcs
simp only [one_pow] at hcs
have heq : ∀ i ∈ s, (μ i * y i)^2 / g i = y i ^2 / g i := by
  intro i hi
  have h1 : (μ i)^2 = 1 := hμ i hi
  have h2 : (μ i * y i)^2 = (μ i)^2 * y i ^2 := by ring
  rw [h2, h1, one_mul]
rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl heq] at hcs
linarith [hcs]

info.lean_statement: ∀ {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (g μ y : ι → ℝ), (∀ i ∈ s, 0 < g i) → (∀ i ∈ s, μ i ^ 2 = 1) → (∑ i ∈ s, μ i * y i) = 1 → 1 / (∑ i ∈ s, g i) ≤ ∑ i ∈ s, y i ^ 2 / g i

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
